overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking from an underground parking garage up into the neon-lit Night City, exploring the urban streets and ascending to an industrial upper-level catwalk. The clip features the game's signature cyberpunk aesthetic with holographic advertisements, futuristic architecture, and atmospheric lighting transitioning from dark artificial to vibrant neon.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground parking garage with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: camera passes the blue car and approaches the white car

agents.ego_description: walking through dimly lit underground garage past parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: person standing near the blue car facing away from camera
person standing near the white car looking toward the wall

entered.detail: large wall with white skull graffiti illuminated by spotlight
vintage-style car with blue and purple iridescent paint
classic white sedan with headlights on

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit underground parking garage with concrete walls covered in graffiti. The camera moves forward past a blue iridescent car and a white sedan, with two NPCs standing near the vehicles. Fluorescent lights illuminate the space as the camera approaches a stairway exit in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway transitioning from underground to surface

events.description: approaching bright light from surface level, transition from artificial to natural/ambient light
emerging from underground stairwell into open urban environment

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs toward the bright city lights above

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading upward with metal railings
tall curved glass skyscraper visible at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a concrete stairway from the garage, transitioning from dim artificial lighting to bright ambient light from the city above. The stairwell walls are covered in graffiti and tags. At the top, a massive glass skyscraper and the neon-lit cityscape become visible as the camera approaches the surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial plaza with holographic advertisements and towering glass buildings

events.description: fully emerging into open urban plaza with towering neon advertisements
turning right to follow the street along the glass tower facade

agents.ego_description: walking through the vibrant city streets, observing the towering advertisements and architecture

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving past on the street below the elevated walkway

entered.detail: tall cylindrical glass building with 'softsys' neon signage
large holographic advertisement with purple and pink neon colors
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings above the street
red and white striped barriers along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into a vast cyberpunk cityscape dominated by the illuminated Softsys tower and massive holographic billboards. The scene is bathed in neon light from advertisements in purple, blue, and orange hues. The camera turns right along the street, passing traffic barriers and observing a futuristic vehicle driving past on the road below.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered service corridor with construction barriers and industrial equipment

events.description: turning into covered alleyway away from the main street
approaching turquoise metal staircase leading to upper level

agents.ego_description: entering a covered service corridor with construction barriers and industrial elements

entered.detail: large construction barriers with red and white horizontal stripes
stacked yellow industrial containers and boxes
industrial metal staircase painted turquoise leading upward
large illuminated billboard showing advertisements on the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The camera turns into a covered service corridor away from the bustling street, entering a more industrial space with red and white construction barriers and yellow storage crates. The lighting shifts back to artificial fluorescent lights. At the end of the corridor, a turquoise metal staircase leads upward to an industrial catwalk level.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial upper-level catwalk with turquoise railings and metal grating

events.description: ascending to upper industrial catwalk level via turquoise staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing turquoise metal stairs and walking along an upper maintenance catwalk

entered.detail: elevated walkway with metal grate flooring and turquoise railings
doorway with bright light emanating from within the building
industrial floodlights mounted on the building exterior

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the turquoise metal staircase to an upper-level industrial catwalk with metal grating floors and matching turquoise railings. The space is narrow and enclosed between building structures, illuminated by industrial floodlights. The camera moves along the catwalk toward a brightly lit doorway at the end of the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim underground garage up into the neon-lit sprawl of a cyberpunk city and finally onto an industrial upper-level catwalk. It begins in a dimly lit parking garage with graffiti-covered concrete walls, moving past iridescent vehicles and NPCs toward a distant stairway. As the camera ascends the stairs, the dim artificial light gives way to the bright ambient glow of the surface, where a massive glass skyscraper and the vibrant cityscape first emerge. The scene then opens into a vast urban environment dominated by the illuminated Softsys tower and colorful holographic billboards before turning away from the bustling street into a covered service corridor filled with construction barriers and storage crates. Finally, the camera climbs a turquoise metal staircase to reach a narrow industrial catwalk with metal grating floors, moving under floodlights toward a brightly lit doorway.
